description: You are a paralegal at a corporate law firm. Revise the draft Vendor Services Agreement between CloudFirst Industries, LLC and Meridian Technology Solutions, Inc. at /home/ga/Documents/vendor_agreement_draft.docx to meet professional legal standards. Ensure the document has a consistent heading hierarchy, standardized vendor name references, a completed Definitions section (including 'Deliverables', 'Service Level Agreement', and 'Term'), a professionally formatted deliverables table, corrected paragraph alignment, and a signature block. Remove any spurious bold or italic formatting. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/vendor_agreement_final.docx.

metadata.data_source: Standard vendor services agreement template based on ABA Model Agreements
